positive: A symmetrical, highly contrasted emblem featuring a celestial crescent moon nestled within stylized botanical mandalas. The design should utilize deep indigo blues, burnt oranges, and matte gold accents. The primary motif combines bioluminescent flora (like glowing ferns and stylized lotus pods) with minimalist astronomical elements (stars, constellations, and orbital rings). Use a clean, heavy linework style combined with negative space principles to achieve sharp, striking silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. The composition must be centralized and geometrically balanced, evoking a sense of mythic natural wonder and cosmic tranquility. Line art, vector graphic aesthetic, tattoo flash style, perfect symmetry, high contrast.
negative: blur, text, watermarks, logos, signatures, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, deformed, low resolution, grain, noise, jpeg artifacts, photorealism, abstract, bokeh, messy, busy background
